title: State Garden
genericDescription: Implement explicit game states; separate input, update, and rendering concerns; handle transitions reliably.
specificDescription: A cheerful orchard arcade game with menu, countdown, play, pause, game-over, and results states. A visible state rail and debug log prove every transition.
gradingRubric: 30 pts state architecture; 20 pts gameplay completeness; 20 pts transition reliability; 15 pts code readability; 15 pts debug/test documentation.
